Josh Hudson
Work About Blog

About

I bring web ideas to life from the sunny South Coast, operating within Brighton's dynamic tech scene. As a Web Developer, I focus on delivering impactful and robust digital experiences by mastering a diverse set of technologies, including HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL, JavaScript/JQuery, and Liquid. My expertise lies in crafting bespoke WordPress and Shopify solutions, complemented by growing knowledge in Laravel, React/NextJS, and Sanity CMS. I'm also currently exploring 3D with ThreeJS, always expanding my capabilities.

Collaboration is at the heart of how I work, ensuring every project truly transforms initial concepts into robust web solutions. My passion extends to the creative side, where I love to tinker with CSS animations and explore generative art. With solid server management and DevOps skills, I ensure every digital environment is not just functional, but secure. My journey, deeply supported by the Brighton dev community, began in 2017, and I've been building and learning ever since.
